documentation.description:
Abstract :

Conversions between several time representations.

All values are expressed relative to a TAI clock.

References:

[1] http://aa.usno.navy.mil/faq/docs/TT.html
[2] http://hpiers.obspm.fr/eoppc/bul/bulc/UTC-TAI.history

simple_types.name: Month_Type
simple_types.code: type Month_Type is (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, …, Dec);

documentation.description: UTC is only for user input or display

simple_types.name: Time_Type
simple_types.code: type Time_Type is delta Small range -2**63 * Small .. (2**63 - 1) * Small;

documentation.description:
This gives a range of +- 292 years:

10.0**-9 seconds/small * 2**63 smalls = 9.2234e9 seconds
60 seconds/min * 60 min/hr * 24 hrs/day * 365 days/year = 3.153e7 seconds/year

record_types.name: GPS_Time_Type

access_types.name: Leap_Second_Table_Access_Type
access_types.code: type Leap_Second_Table_Access_Type is access constant Leap_Second_Table_Type;

subtypes.name: Internal_Time_System_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Internal_Time_System_Type is Time_System_Type range TAI .. Relative;

documentation.description: UTC is only for user input or display
See unit test
[1] 0 Hour 1 January 1958, TAI system; TAI origin
[1] 12 Hour 1 January 2000 TT, converted to TAI system

This gives a range of +- 292 years:

10.0**-9 seconds/small * 2**63 smalls = 9.2234e9 seconds
60 seconds/min * 60 min/hr * 24 hrs/day * 365 days/year = 3.153e7 seconds/year
time in TT system = time in TAI system + TT_Offset
[1] 12 Hour 1 January 2000 TT, converted to TAI system

subprograms.name: "mod"
subprograms.code: function "mod" (Dividend, Divisor : in Time_Type) return Time_Type

subprograms.name: Checked_Unsigned_16
subprograms.code: function Checked_Unsigned_16 (Label : in String; Item : in Time_Type) return Interfaces.Unsigned_16

documentation.description:
If Item is in range of Unsigned_16, return Unsigned_16 (Item).
Else raise Range_Error with Label, value of Item in message.

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (File_Name : in String) return Leap_Second_Table_Type

documentation.description:
Create the leap_second table from a standard input file.

The latest input file is at [2].

subprograms.name: Day_Of_Year
subprograms.code:
function Day_Of_Year
  (In_Year  : in Integer;
   In_Month : in Month_Type)
  return Integer

documentation.description:
Return the day of year for the first day of each month; Jan 1
is day 1.

subprograms.name: Floor
subprograms.code: function Floor (Item : in Time_Type) return Time_Type

documentation.description: Same as Time_Type'Floor would be.

subprograms.name: Floor
subprograms.code: function Floor (Item : in Time_Type) return Integer

documentation.description: Same as Time_Type'Floor would be.

subprograms.name: Floor_Unsigned_16
subprograms.code: function Floor_Unsigned_16 (Item : in Time_Type) return Interfaces.Unsigned_16

documentation.description:
Return smallest integral value not less than Item.

Raises SAL.Range_Error (with no message) if Item is outside
range of Unsigned_16.

subprograms.name: Floor_Unsigned_32
subprograms.code: function Floor_Unsigned_32 (Item : in Time_Type) return Interfaces.Unsigned_32

documentation.description:
Return smallest integral value not less than Item.

Raises SAL.Range_Error (with no message) if Item is outside
range of Unsigned_32.

documentation.description: Return TRUE if Year is a leap year.

documentation.description: Return a UTC converted from TAI.

subprograms.code: function To_TAI_Time (GPS : in GPS_Time_Type) return Time_Type

subprograms.name: To_TAI_Time
subprograms.code:
function To_TAI_Time
  (Days           : in Integer;
   Seconds_Of_Day : in Time_Type)
  return Time_Type

documentation.description:
Result is relative.

Nominally, Seconds_Of_Day should be < Seconds_Per_Day, but in
fact it can be any Time_Type value.

subprograms.name: To_TAI_Time

documentation.description: Result is relative.

subprograms.name: To_TAI_Time

documentation.description:
If absolute, Year must be > 1958, and result is seconds since TAI origin.

If not Absolute, leap days are ignored, and result is relative.

subprograms.name: To_TAI_Time
subprograms.code:
function To_TAI_Time
  (Time     : in String;
   Absolute : in Boolean)
  return Time_Type

documentation.description:
Time must be ASIST format or extended ASIST format. If
Absolute, result is seconds since TAI origin.

documentation.description: TAI_Time is seconds since TAI origin. Day is in range 1 .. 364

subprograms.name: UTC_To_TAI
subprograms.code:
function UTC_To_TAI
  (UTC_Input_Time     : in Time_Type;
   Leap_Seconds_Table : in Leap_Second_Table_Type)
  return Time_Type

documentation.description: Return a TAI converted from UTC.
